_notes: Canonical MCP server config for nl-ez-plugin. Edit only this file. Run scripts/render-mcp.py to regenerate .mcp.json / .gemini/settings.json / .codex/config.toml / .vscode/mcp.json.

nl-gov-data._notes: Dutch government open-data MCP — search/fetch legislation, parliamentary records, Rijksoverheid documents. Hosts the nl-gov-data, nl-gov-shared, nl-issue-framing, nl-parliamentary-positioning, nl-policy-legislative-landscape, and nl-tensions skills (fetched at runtime via fs_read). Per-user OAuth via Microsoft Entra ID.

stromy-format._notes: Hosted format skills (format-pptx, format-pptx-hd, format-docx, format-pdf, format-pdf-hd, format-xlsx, format-mermaid, format-diagram, format-chart, format-remotion-video). Fetched at runtime via fs_read — see skills/<name>/SKILL.md stubs.

asset-broker._notes: Authenticated client-asset broker — propose reviewed brand/charter (and website, if any) edits as GitHub PRs (asset-editor skill, fetched via fs_read). Per-user OAuth via Microsoft Entra ID; the caller's client.<slug> role(s) scope what they can edit. Requires the stromy-asset-broker GitHub App on the target repos (client-data + the client's website repo).

ms365._notes: Tool-limited Microsoft 365 broker for deliverable delivery only: create an upload session, resolve the caller's OneDrive / SharePoint destination, and hand the credential-free uploadUrl to stromy-format's deliver_to push contract. Exported plugins keep the env vars portable per machine; do not hardcode operator-local cache paths here.
